scoring_strategy.rubric: PER-IMAGE-VALIDATION-TEMPLATE Axis A + Axis B + Axis D (MANDATORY for NEEDS_PURPOSE_BUILT_UI) + business-spec module coverage
scoring_strategy.image_isolation: subagent-only; no PNGs read in main context

convergence_criterion: PROPER-EXAMINATION-PLAN-v1 + VISUAL-REEXAMINATION-PLAN dual criterion: score_delta<1% AND coverage_NOT_YET_EXAMINED=0
extrapolation: DISALLOWED — every flow must be directly scored
